scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,server -c blue,green "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev:h5: concurrently -n h5,server -c magenta,green "npm run dev:h5 --prefix frontend" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.clean:dev: pkill -f "concurrently -n frontend,server" || true; pkill -f "concurrently -n h5,server" || true; pkill -f "npm run dev:frontend" || true; pkill -f "npm run dev:server" || true; pkill -f "npm run dev:h5 --prefix frontend" || true; pkill -f "uni -p mp-weixin" || true; pkill -f "nodemon index.js" || true; pkill -f "/Users/tiannengyu/Downloads/dafu/server/index.js" || true; lsof -tiTCP:3001 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -tiTCP:5173 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; lsof -tiTCP:5174 -sTCP:LISTEN | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true
